# Stefan Manja

Stefan Manja builds internal AI systems for enterprise and mid-market workflows.

Site: https://stefanmanja.com
Contact: stefan@stefanmanja.com
Location: Belgrade, Serbia (CET)
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/stefan-manja/
GitHub: https://github.com/manjast

## Engagement model

Stefan is currently an AI engineer at Bosch (enterprise and industrial AI).
He is selectively available for project-based consulting on internal AI systems alongside this role:
build, hardening, and scoped advisory work.
Engagements are project-scoped and typically serve enterprise or mid-market teams.

## Primary fit

- Project-based build work for internal AI workflows
- Hardening and productionising pilots or prototypes
- Scoped advisory work tied to real delivery decisions

## Good fit

- Teams with a concrete internal workflow, real users, and a clear owner
- Internal assistants, knowledge-access systems, and analyst-support tools
- Work that needs disciplined evaluation, deployment, and post-launch usefulness

## Not a fit

- Pure idea-stage exploration with no workflow owner or adoption path
- Generic AI transformation requests without a defined problem
- Marketing chatbot work where visual novelty matters more than operational quality

## Proof points

- ~75% reduction in credit-risk analysis time (Delta Holding)
- 90%+ recommendation acceptance rate from analysts
- 4.4/5 analyst-rated quality on LLM-assisted workflow
- 50+ AI use cases from PoC through first scaled delivery
- Self-hosted enterprise knowledge assistant (Docker, pgvector, Azure AD SSO)

## Primary pages

- / : overview, proof, fit guidance, services
- /work : internal AI case studies
- /work/delta-credit-risk-workflow : LLM-assisted credit-risk workflow (Delta Holding)
- /work/delta-enterprise-rag-assistant : self-hosted knowledge assistant (Delta Holding)
- /services : service modes and delivery path
- /contact : contact and project qualification

## Technical context

Stack includes Python, Flask, Docker, PostgreSQL, pgvector, LangChain, Azure AD SSO,
LLM APIs, and workflow automation for enterprise environments.

## Public evidence of working method

The Agentic Development Playbook (https://github.com/manjast/agentic-development-playbook)
is public evidence of scoped, evaluation-gated AI delivery — not a product or tutorial.
